heading: Change Streams
body:
Atlas limits the total number of change streams open against a given
cluster based on the cluster's size. The following table lists
the limitations for each cluster size:

| Cluster Size                        | Maximum Number of Change Streams |
| ----------------------------------- | -------------------------------- |
| Free cluster                        | 5                                |
| Flex Clusters                       | 10                               |
| Small, Dedicated Clusters (M10/M20) | 100                              |
| Standard Clusters (M30/M40)         | 1000                             |
| Standard Clusters (M50 - M90)       | 1000                             |
| High-Power Clusters (M100+)         | 1000                             |

> **Note:** Atlas opens a single change stream on each collection that is
> associated with a [database trigger](atlas-database-trigger).
